Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Eurias]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — Eurias is a powerful magical focus described as the Life-Giver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — Eurias is a length of smooth, pale wood with a blue crystal orb on top containing the spirit of an ocean world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 9''' — The Captain intends to use Eurias' power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 11''' — Eurias is a one-of-a-kind staff that cannot be easily translated, copied, or understood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 13''' — The narrator considers if they will need Eurias for their next opponent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 14''' — Eurias is Varic's staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — Eurias can blow wind and rain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 30''' — Eurias is kept in a crate with seals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 31''' — Eurias is a place where powers roll through, gushing Aether and radiating life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — Eurias is a wand whose power comes from World Spirits of life and water.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — Eurias is used for calling down rainstorms on a whole hemisphere.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — Eurias is a foot-long rectangle of metal plates containing a crystal branch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — The enchantment of Eurias is focus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — Eurias draws magic out faster while keeping the spell ordered.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 33''' — The enchantment of Eurias keeps the spell locked on a single point or target at a time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 34''' — Eurias is an object that Benri Vallenar might hold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 36''' — Eurias is a heavy weight in Varic Vallenar's mind/storage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 39''' — The Iron King has seen Eurias.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — Eurias is a power or entity that can cause vines to erupt and bend the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — Eurias is a character or entity that the narrator did not release.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 44''' — The Iron King grabs Eurias from a case.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — The Iron King released Eurias to take a gigantic form and fight the Divine Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 46''' — Eurias is a staff held by the narrator.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — Eurias is a staff used by the narrator to cast spells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 28''' — Eurias is a location the narrator is traveling to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 28''' — Eurias's staff is made from a World Spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Eurias is a world-level staff known as the Life-Giver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Eurias is made of smooth, pale wood from an Aethril world-tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Eurias is topped with a blue crystal orb containing a churning sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — The orb in Eurias contains the remains of the World Spirit of the planet Eurias.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Eurias is a planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Eurias runs with Aetheric power that can interact with physical forms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — Eurias is a tool or entity used for brute magical work.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — Eurias provided the strength for a large-scale spell cast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — Eurias magnified the Mirror of Silence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — Eurias is a power or entity that the narrator can only cast one spell at a time when using.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 38''' — The narrator's casting speed through Eurias was slow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 46''' — Eurias is a location held by an Archmage of the Cosmic Path.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Eurias is an object that can be broken open.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Eurias is kept in a case and requires sealing to prevent Aether consumption.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 54''' — The narrator thought they might have accidentally connected to Eurias during the Subspace dive.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 4''' — Eurias is a power or entity that can clear out Scourge Warrens.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 18''' — Casting is not as powerful as it would have been if Eurias were casting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 24''' — Eurias is a location that can assist in reaching another star system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — Eurias is a crystal that can melt and rise into the narrator's hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — Eurias is an object kept in a crystal case.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Eurias is a blue crystal that can be liquefied with a touch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 43''' — Eurias is a significant entity to the Aether.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Eurias is a staff made of pale wood topped with a blue orb containing the World Spirit of a destroyed ocean planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Eurias is a staff that glows blue and can summon miniature rainclouds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — Eurias is a staff that the narrator's students did not bring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — Eurias has metaphysical weight comparable to a planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Eurias can cast spells from neighboring planets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 34''' — Eurias is an item held by the narrator during a ritual.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Eurias is a being whose magical weight is equivalent to the Voice of Solstice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Eurias was released by crushing the Absolute Burial spell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Eurias is a planet where one can negotiate with World Spirits or threaten them from orbit.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
